question: Bitcoin $67K in May?
textDescription:
The market resolves “Yes” if Bitcoin (BTC) reaches or dips below $67,000 USD at any point in May 2026, based on data from Coinbase. The price must be reflected as the high/low price in any 1-minute candlestick during the month. If Bitcoin does not hit $67K during May 2026, the market resolves “No.”

Resolution Date & Time: May 31, 2026, at 23:59 PT, or earlier if Bitcoin crosses $67K at any time during the month.
